title: Address Copilot review on PR #1175

PR: docs: capture architectural knowledge (design-principles + Architecture-Internals)
https://github.com/openwpm/OpenWPM/pull/1175

## Unresolved Copilot review threads

- `docs/design-principles.rst:71`

  The worked example describes routing a JS instrumentation failure back to `BrowserManager` over the extension's privileged socket, but the current socket path is not an extension-to-`BrowserManager` failure channel: `BrowserManager` creates a `ClientSocket` that only sends messages, and the extension's `ListeningSocket` callback only receives Initialize/Finalize/visit-id messages. As written, this example can mislead contributors into relying on a channel that does not currently deliver failures back to `BrowserManager`; either describe the additional protocol that would be needed or use an existing failure-reporting path.

---

VERIFY each claim before acting — Copilot is fallible (it once flagged a valid os.getenv(key, default=...) as a bug). If real -> fix + resolve the thread. If wrong -> post a reasoned rebuttal + resolve. Builder -> the-hater -> done; never blindly apply.
